title: Hemianemia rutifolia

This family comprises over 2,000 species of plants, including Hemianemia rutifolia, and is widely distributed across the world. Hemianemia rutifolia itself is a species of flowering plant that is native to tropical regions, particularly in Asia and the Pacific.
